title: WizardFabric
body:
# WizardFabric - Unleash Your Inner Wizard!

This mod adds a variety of different wands to the game of Minecraft. 

Currently only the Fire Wand exists. It shoots a fire charge wherever the user is aiming at the cost of 1 level of XP as well as some durability on the staff. 


## Crafting:

### Basic Wand Staff - The base of any staff

![Basic Wand Staff crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87d36fc4a602c3b51ec97808d926fea01fba6c9f.png)


### Fire Wand Head

![Fire Wand Head crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e695318e5b7754ed4d5539b854a29ea82573c77b.png)

### Fire Wand

![Fire Wand crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/945c3b67bce2286b5d3eb93f6b088ac603ad8504.png)


## Future Plans:

Ice Wand
Gravity Wand
Thunder Wand
Wand Passive effects


Created by SixSingleBird and Shovelknight__
